summary: Complete testing of 'Become a Professional' feature - Phase 1. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed admin Pro tab and public marketplace pages work correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test professional application that was approved during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Professional marketplace feature is fully functional. Endpoints tested: GET /api/pro/info, POST /api/pro/apply, GET /api/pro/application/status, GET /api/admin/pro/applications, PUT /api/admin/pro/applications/{id}/review, GET /api/pros, GET /api/pros/{pro_id}. Admin panel Pro tab shows list of applications with approve/reject functionality. Public /pro page shows approved professionals with search/filter capabilities. Application form at /pro/apply is a 4-step wizard (Profil, Expertise, Crédibilité, Services).

backend_endpoints: GET /api/pro/info - No auth required, returns pro program information
POST /api/pro/apply - Auth required, submits professional application
GET /api/pro/application/status - Auth required, returns user's application status
GET /api/admin/pro/applications - Admin only, lists all applications with filtering
GET /api/pros - No auth, lists approved professionals with search/filter/sort
GET /api/pros/{pro_id} - No auth, returns professional profile details
frontend_pages: /admin - Pro tab displays professional applications list
